channel.title: ☁️ Cloud Labs on A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Recent content in ☁️ Cloud Labs on A Guide to Cloud & AI

item.title: Azure DevOps CI/CD — Full Hands-on Lab
item.description: This practical Azure DevOps hands-on lab takes you through the full CI/CD process — build, test, and deploy — using real-world examples.

item.title: Azure App Service Migration Lab
item.description: Get hands-on with Azure App Service migration in this step-by-step tutorial. Whether you’re new to Azure or looking to sharpen your cloud migration skills, this practical lab shows you how to move your applications to Azure with confidence.

item.title: Azure VNet Peering — Hands-on Lab
item.description: Get hands-on experience with Azure VNet Peering. Learn how to connect virtual networks in Azure, configure peering, and understand key networking concepts.

item.title: Azure Firewall — Beginner Hands-on Lab
item.description: This lab walks you through how to set up and configure Azure Firewall. Learn about rules, policies, and how Azure Firewall helps protect your cloud workloads.
